allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines[-20:]: try: data = json.loads\(line\) if data.get\('type'\) in ['user', 'assistant']: role = data.get\('type', ''\) content = data.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for item in content: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {item[\\"text\\"][:500]}'\) break elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:500]}'\) except: pass ")
